emails.subject: List of authorized traders
emails.body: Marie: OK, here's a request from the outside. Have we heard from Cassandra? emails.subject: Re: List of authorized traders
emails.body: Re: List of authorized traders No. I left Veronica Valdez a voice mail yesterday as to the status, but have heard nothing. Marie Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-3490 Marie.Heard@Enron.com Sara Shackleton@ECT 06/05/2001 11:39 AM
